arts.ttl: Serie A | Juventus v Napoli: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Scottish international Scott McTominay is set to make his starting debut for Napoli against Juventus, while Bianconeri youngster Nicolò Savona may get the nod for Federico Gatti. Gatti, who suffered an ankle injury during Juventus’ 3-1 victory over PSV Eindhoven in the Champions League, has reportedly recovered. Coach Thiago Motta confirmed in his pre-match press conference that Gatti will be “available,” but according to Sky Sport Italia, he is not yet fully fit. This situation could lead Motta to shift Pierre Kalulu to center-back and start Savona as a right-back.
